AR1.justification: Routed correctly: new daybook entry for cold-pickup Log, followups.md updated for the open legal review, and explicit rationale for not writing to decisions.md or observations.md (no new commitment or durable pattern).

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; AR2 is n/a per rubric.

AR3.justification: References use relative paths with ISO-date anchors (daybook/2026-04-21.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md, followups.md, tmp/) and all resolve against the seed workspace.

AR4.justification: Creates a new dated daybook file (append-only by date) and updates the existing followup entry in-line per followups.md's lifecycle convention — re-running on a later day would just create a new daybook and re-touch the same followup, no conflict.
